para_trans: 3. The Commissioner, Ministry of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Maharashtra State, Pune to control the expenditure of this fund.

The controller will remain as the officer. While disbursing the said funds, action should be taken to disburse funds to the activities concerned only after ensuring that the proposal for non-salaried grants is found to be suitable.

4. Proceedings for disbursement of funds by verifying that the penalty is applicable to the activity concerned or how and if applicable, the penalty has been imposed as per Section No. 5, Auxiliary Grants, Part-I, Roll No. 77 (nine) of the School Code.
should be done.

The Controlling Officer shall control the expenditure of the funds in section 4 of the aforesaid statement and disburse the funds subject to furnishing of utilization certificates, statement of expenditure and statement of expenditure.
The utility certificate should be submitted to the government without fail within 1 month.
6. Maharashtra Budget Manual, School Code and Fiscal while the Controller General of Expenditure.
The rights mentioned in the manual as well as issued by the Planning Department, Finance Department as well as this Department from time to time.
Strict adherence to the guidelines and norms in force, delegations of financial powers and instructions issued from time to time.
7. Funds / grants may not be spent for any purpose other than the purpose for which they are sanctioned. As well as other
Funds cannot be diverted to the head of the account.
The memorandum was made available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
